title: Baldi FNF Music Mod
description: Today is Friday. And, you do love horror things in school at night. Welcome you! This horror fantastic game will fulfill your dream with funkin music battles.
instructions: HOW TO ENJOY THIS FUNKIN GAME Just tap to the arrow to make them perfectly match Try your best to beat enemies in rap battle as well as you can to get the highest score point and unlock all amazing FNF songs Enjoy this funkin time with Baldi - a basi
